properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 119/14

BARENTS SEA
1. IN CONNECTION WITH THE GOLIAT FIELD DEVELOPMENT A SUBSEA POWER CABLE IS LAID.
    CABLE IN THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS IS STILL UNPROTECTED (WGS84    DATUM)

   70-42.45N 23-48.77E
   70-43.76N 23-52.59E
   70-45.38N 23-48.95E
   70-47.27N 23-37.42E
   

AND FROM:

   71-01.03N 23-07.09E
   71-20.74N 22-22.48E
   71-19.04N 22-14.07E

THE CABLE WILL BE UNPROTECTED IN PERIODS DURING THE INSTALLATION AND FISHING VESSELS ARE ASKED TO BE CAUTIOUS WHEN FISHING NEAR THE 

CABLE.
INSTALLATION WORK WILL LAST FROM LATE JULY TILL NOVEMBER.
FOR FURTHER INFORMATION PLEASE CONTACT GUARD VESSEL ASPER MARIA, CALL SIGN LJCQ ON VHF CH 16 OR TELEPHONE 0047 915 57 339

3. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 117/14
